'''Sal Ghator''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] who was living in the mixed class village of [[La'okio]] on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. A former [[subaltern]], Sal was caught by the [[Extolled]] [[Bava]], stealing out of the Extolled's crops, who brought this information to [[Tahiri Veila]]. Sal didn't believe in living with former [[Shamed Ones]].

{{Char-stub}}
